category_sources: Official GitHub README describes zet as a command-line utility for set operations on files considered as sets of lines.
source_facts.description says zet finds union, intersection, and set difference of files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use the name zet.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface; repository also contains a doc directory but no separate docs site was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/yarrow/zet; per instructions repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes line-based union, intersection, diff, and related subcommands.
source_facts.executables lists zet as a CLI executable.
